200111.Clue: Testimony 1: "Sea Lilies... in a place like the highlands, <tagId=1>*they shouldn't appear*. Placing fresh flowers under a tree implies remembrance... feels like something done by someone <tagId=2>*familiar with Lallipar*..."

200112.Clue: Testimony 2: "Fresh <tagId=3>*Sea Lilies are terribly expensive* this season! Not much grows in the highlands naturally... <tagId=4>*Existing crops seem to have been originally imported from outside*..."

200113.Clue: Testimony 3: "Could it be a <tagId=5>*Voyager* who placed it? Everyone respects this place... When visiting, many people <tagId=6>*bring gifts from outside* to show gratitude..."

300111.Clue:
We set off, and so far, everything has been smooth.
The team is very experienced, worthy of being an expedition team. The route chosen by the ecologist has almost allowed us to avoid all the monsters, which is incredible.
However, that guy who joined the team temporarily like me, seems to be called... Ryan? *He always accidentally attracts monsters and gets scolded by the captain.*
TapBubble: How unprofessional is Ryan as a guide?

300112.Clue:
We're stuck. Judging by the weather patterns, this storm doesn't look natural-our ecologist suspects it's the work of goblins.
*Black clouds are starting to appear in the distance,* and judging by the direction, they seem to be coming from the sea, which is not a good sign. If goblins are performing some strange ritual and we encounter a forest downpour in this season, that would be...
*The howls of monsters are echoing from all directions.* Thankfully, we adjusted our route ahead of time. There are still some supplies at Station Six. It's on higher ground, safe from flooding, and should give us a place to take shelter for now.
TapBubble: The black clouds have already approached, and the sky has darkened, making it unsuitable to continue moving forward.
It looks like danger is lurking around.

300113.Clue:
Everyone tried their best, *the wind can break trees*. If we don't return to Station No. 6 soon, there will only be bigger troubles.
We *found his backpack by the tree at the cliff*, along with some *messy footprints*. Ryan *guessed he might have slipped and fallen*.
No one knows where Roy came from, so we could only put up a cenotaph by the tree outside the station.
TapBubble: The wind can drown out people's voices.
He put down his backpack before going to the edge of the cliff.
Could it be an emergency... or was there more than one person present?
The conclusion of the misstep seems somewhat perfunctory...

300211.Clue:
As the team was advancing, suddenly a *storm struck*, followed by loud exclamations from behind.
Turning back, they found... Reed had vanished into thin air! It was the *ancient curse of Kanamia* that had come true!
On-site investigation: There were long *drag marks* on the ground.
TapBubble: There is a storm
Ancient curse of Kanamia
Drag marks

300212.Clue:
As the team passed through the wind gap, *the wind suddenly became so strong that they couldn't open their eyes*.
When they came to their senses, Golg was already gone. He must have taken something from the altar, invoking the *ancient curse of Kanamia*!
On-site investigation: Beside was a *thousand-foot cliff*.
TapBubble: The wind suddenly intensified
Ancient curse of Kanamia
Beside a thousand-foot cliff

300213.Clue:
As the group was moving normally, they were suddenly struck by *a powerful gust of wind blowing from the cliff.* Then, Duko vanished.
The valley echoed with the howling wind, like the cry of wolves... the guide said it was *the furious howl of the Kanamia White Wolf*...
Even more terrifying, a *damaged Golem* was seen hovering over the distant mountains, glaring at us with obvious hostility.
Answer: Strong wind blowing from the cliff
The howl of Kanamia's white wolf
TapBubble: Strong wind blowing from the cliff
The howl of Kanamia's white wolf
Damaged Golem

400111.Clue: A Young Couple: "During the <tagId=1>*blessing ritual*, spring water blessed by the ancestors can heal wounds..."
TapBubble: Sounds like a very important tribal ritual...

400112.Clue: Elder Kanamian: "The Forbidden Zone has been <tagId=2>*closed for too long*... Without the spring water, injuries can't heal..."
TapBubble: Looks like the Forbidden Zone hasn't been open to outsiders for a long time.

400113.Clue: Kanamian Youth: "I was below <tagId=3>*the eastern cliff* praying to the ancestors..."
TapBubble: There's a blessing site below the eastern cliff.

500111.Clue: After I fainted... I saw mist. But it wasn't the nauseating Void Engram! It was... <tagId=1>*some pale red mist*... beautiful, and so, so unreal.
TapBubble: I've never seen red mist before.

500112.Clue: Then, I forced myself to calm down. Oddly, after I forced myself to <tagId=2>*calm down*, the "monsters" were still around me but not as aggressive anymore.
TapBubble: A calm mind seems to weaken the nightmare's impact.

500113.Clue: As a member of the Artisan Guild, I was sent to the Highlands to study a newly unearthed Legacy. They say it's a kind of <tagId=3>*calming device*. If we can verify and use it early, it might help ease this phenomenon.
TapBubble: A newly discovered Legacy on the Highlands, seeming to have a calming effect.

700111.Clue:
The Starsoul Flask is *Lothar's masterpiece.* Not only that, Lothar also has to go around clearing out Illusory Blooms, so he's extremely busy. In fact, he's not even at the Pillar of Divinity today.
*Priest Gisela distributes Starsoul Flasks periodically.* But 500... that's too many. Still, if you have a legitimate reason, it might be worth asking her.
Answer: Priest Gisela distributes the flasks periodically
700111.Tips: Find clues from the Pilgrim's words
TapBubble: He's not even at the Pillar of Divinity today...
She definitely won't agree to hand over 500 Starsoul Flasks.

700112.Clue: Boyce never talks about his past, but his bearing marks him as someone with an extraordinary background. His strength, too, seems exceptional. It's said that sometimes, <tagId=3>*Boyce is the one who keeps order during the distribution of Starsoul Flasks*.
Answer: Boyce oversees the distribution of the flasks
700112.Tips: Find clues from the Pilgrim's words
TapBubble: Boyce... I suppose I know him, in a way.

700113.Clue:
Starsoul Flasks are limited, and today's supply ran out early.
But if you're truly in a bind, try speaking with Boyce *on the road in front of the Pillar of Divinity*—he might be willing to make an exception.
Answer: On the road in front of the Pillar of Divinity
700113.Tips: Find clues from the Pilgrim's words
TapBubble: That's right, this is the place!

800111.Clue: There's a <tagId=1>*strange blank space* in the middle of the duty roster—was no one on shift at the time?
TapBubble: Yes, it must be so!

800112.Clue:
Using the strange blank space as a dividing line, the sergeants previously handed over duty every six hours, and after that *duty shifts were extended to eight hours*.
*Some areas even show personnel gaps*.
TapBubble: So even the troopers have to work overtime
Could it be that they no longer have enough people to cover the surface mines?

800113.Clue:
On closer inspection, *the number of Sergeants on Duty has dropped*... Now, sort out the lists of sergeants who were on duty before and after the dividing line.
Before the dividing line: *Sergeant Milo*, Sergeant Osmond, Sergeant Murray, Sergeant Leo, Sergeant Ethan, *Sergeant Breck*, and *Sergeant Devin*.
After the dividing line: Sergeant Murray, Sergeant Osmond, Sergeant Ethan, and Sergeant Leo
Answer: The number of Sergeants on Duty has dropped
TapBubble: Where is he...
Hope he's fine.
I have a bad feeling.

900111.Clue:
Nevelle carries *Crimson Marrow* on him and can also make *Blackstone soldiers* back him up.
From the fleeing soldiers we learned their original target was *Maire*.
TapBubble: So Nevelle has Crimson Marrow on him
Even the soldiers of the Garrison Outpost stepped forward for him
That way he can take over the caravan

900112.Clue:
Who knows what that *Man in Black* is about... Completely unhinged! I never want to deal with someone like that again in my life!
Thank goodness. Once we finish clearing the bulk cargo, I can head back. I'll bring you a souvenir.
We owe the success of this deal to that well-informed subordinate. If he hadn't made contact with Nevelle, I would never have known about this opportunity. Today he mentioned that an important figure who helped arrange this connection wants to meet me... (remainder of text lost)
TapBubble: That guy must be stirring things up behind the scenes

900113.Clue:
*Take out your boss* and the caravan is yours. Then, you'll get in on higher-tier deals. I might even let you take some samples first.
Carl will help you.
You've seen "this kind of" examples, haven't you? *The wealth and glory you crave* are just one shot away.
Answer: The wealth and glory you crave
TapBubble: Want to get in on higher-tier deals?
